chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-5630 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to maintainability of petition 22.1.2026 --------------------- None present for the petitioners. On the last date of hearing i.e. 21.11.2025, learned counsel was directed to satisfy this Court about the maintainability of this petition on the next date of hearing. Today, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
